reviews.review_description: I used to dream about controlling my own mech since I was a wee lad. Finally, we can. Not only is this game beautiful, it's incredibly fun. The variety of guns is a nice touch, being able to fly by and blast someone with a shotgun is so much. AND the fact this game was made by such small team makes it that much better.
It would be better to have better movement

reviews.review_title: Incredible achievement for a small team.
reviews.review_description:
​This game is an absolute masterpiece on the Quest 3. From the moment you jump in, the gameplay loop is incredibly fun and rewarding. It strikes a perfect balance, making you feel the weight of the machine while maintaining an agility that keeps the action fast-paced.
​The movement and combat systems are unique and exhilarating. Unlike other titles that can feel clunky, the control scheme here makes you feel powerful and responsive. The combat is punchy, and the overall vibe of the game is just fantastic. It is immersive and consistently engaging.
​What makes this even more impressive is that it was developed by Hyperlight VR LLC, a two-person indie studio. The level of polish and quality they have achieved is stunning and puts many larger studios to shame.
​I really hope this game gets the success and recognition it deserves. I would love to see the developers continue to expand on this foundation, especially with the addition of multiplayer PvP in the future. If you are looking for a high-quality VR mech shooter, support these devs and buy this game.

[Disclamier I got the game for free from devs but this is my honest opinion]
The movement is so unique its hard to wrap your head around but once you do manage to get the hang of it, it feels amazing; only complaint about movement is I would like an option to make it more sensitive and perhaps make the slider go up to 150% or 200%, but thats nitpicking. Also love the amounts of customization that the game has, both cosmetic and functional. Sure theres jank here and there but that's to be expected for such a small team and the product is amazing.

MECHA has a nice gameplay loop involving the MECHA League, challenges, and trying out different weapons. 

The player can elect to take on certain challenges before a match, which encourages the player to explore all the weapons in the sandbox.

Movement in the game is easy to understand, but difficult (satisfying) to master. With enough practice, you can really start to move around the map.

The ability to take on challenges pair nicely with the progression of learning the movement. Taking on multiple challenges in one match can really push the player.

Really looking forward to see where this game goes.

No game feels like this game. flying feels like surfing/ skating. the revolutionary flying mechanics will be the future for other vr games to come. there is a learning curve, but once mastered, the campaign (mecha league) will be both fun and challenging. AI opponents can be challenging at times, but that's what makes winning that more enjoyable.
***Disclaimer*** received game for free to review 

Check out the full review on my channel coming soon https://www.youtube.com/@samurachi420

Not easy at first, controls do take some getting used to(Theres a practice room)but once you get it you genuinely just want to play more and more. Fast paced gameplay with a lot of action so be prepared to sweat. Great work by the team and expect many more great things.

One of the most fun VR shooters I’ve played recently. The experience is very well crafted, with intuitive controls, responsive movement, and a strong sense of immersion that really puts you inside the action.
The gameplay is smooth, the pacing is engaging, and you can clearly see the attention to detail in both the shooting mechanics and the level design. It’s the kind of game you start just to try and suddenly find yourself fully immersed.
Excellent work. It shows technical maturity and a solid understanding of what truly works in virtual reality.

Love the weapons unique gameplay  all the game are guns and it doesn't get repetitive the massive mech mod is sick but they should add the option to use joysticks movement since i play in a small space and cant move that much it would be nice

Just uploaded gameplay on my channel! 

https://youtu.be/NQKGXmwosBU?si=4mhxkmkw4m6YK3iX 

the movement mechanics are unique and gameplay is fast paced and fun!

Ngl kinda floored by the level of immersion. Very rarely do you play a VR title with this level of polish. Loved everything about it. The only negative I can think of is, just be careful if you have bad knees.
This is so fun! The only thing hard is the movement, but you get used to it.  I've never seen a game with this movement though.
the movement and combat are very unique and unlike any VR game i have played
This game is actually very fun and once you get used to the movement it becomes a game I could play for hours
This game is exactly what I want in a VR game! Played at a friends and immediately bought when i got home. Great work!
This game is crazy fun … my buddy bluddy told me about it . It definitely was a little hard to get the hang of everything but after a couple matches it really starts flowing!!
its an amazing game with a lot of potential and it will get better with more updates

reviews.review_title: This game is AWESOME but a few bugs
reviews.review_description: This game is INSANELY fun and worth it but there can be a couple of things that can mess up the immersion and also impacts the ability to record content on the game.turning down the sfx still doesn’t turn the volume down of the cheering in the background and that kinda messes up the ability to record when they hear more cheering than me speaking.the movement is pretty unique but being unique has a ton of movement bugs.sometimes going into walls,moving by itself etc.but overall very fun game and would definitely recommend playing

Ngl i cant say i didnt have fun playing this but it was definitely hard to play while standing because to go up i had to go on my tippy toes and if you have played this game at all youll know you have to go up a lot in this game so after a play sesh my toes hurt like hell but otherwise pretty cool game and love my brothers at mecha for giving this to me for free

Tried this Gem out last night for the first time and it is excellent. Graphics, gameplay, upgrades,quest, and the combat is incredibly addictive. Movement is kinda weird but once I started to get the hang of it the game blossomed into a blast of a time. If you’re looking for something different to try give Mecha a try.
This game has been absolutely amazing and this game was made by 2 people wow I would like to see more games by this team.
Best mech game on quest!!!
